commitMessage: Add R key to reset game from any state

topics.title: Add keyboard shortcut to reset the game at any time
topics.trigger: Players had no way to restart the game mid-session without refreshing the page or waiting for a game over screen. A dedicated reset key was needed so players could start fresh at any point.
topics.response:
- In `src/main.ts`, added an `R`/`r` key handler at the top of the existing keyboard input method so it fires before any other key logic, calling the new-game routine unconditionally regardless of current game state (running, paused, or game over).
- Also in `src/main.ts`, the new-game routine was updated to explicitly hide the pause overlay when resetting, preventing a stale pause banner from persisting into the new game.
- In `index.html`, the on-screen controls hint was updated to include "Press R to Reset" so players are aware of the shortcut.
topics.decisions:
- **Reset works from any state**: The reset key is handled before pause or direction checks, meaning it fires whether the game is running, paused, or on the game over screen. This avoids a class of bugs where the reset could be silently ignored depending on game state, and keeps the shortcut reliably available as an escape hatch.
- **Hiding the pause overlay on reset**: Rather than relying on the pause toggle to clean up its own state, the reset routine now explicitly clears the pause overlay. This prevents a subtle visual bug where resetting from a paused state would leave the pause banner visible over the new game.

recap: Players can now press R at any point during a Snake session to immediately restart the game. The shortcut works regardless of whether the game is running, paused, or sitting on the game over screen, and the on-screen controls hint has been updated to advertise it. A subtle visual bug was also resolved: resetting from a paused state no longer leaves the pause banner visible over the freshly started game.
